mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO users
username, password, real_name, student_id, grade, major, email, phone, user_type, avatar_url, status, token_version, created_at, updated_at,
#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{studentId}, #{grade}, #{major}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{userType}, #{avatarUrl}, #{status}, #{tokenVersion}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.update:
UPDATE users
password = #{password},
real_name = #{realName},
avatar_url = #{avatarUrl},
student_id = #{studentId},
grade = #{grade},
major = #{major},
email = #{email},
phone = #{phone},
user_type = #{userType},
status = #{status},
token_version = #{tokenVersion},
last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime},
last_login_ip = #{lastLoginIp},
updated_at = #{updatedAt},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from users where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select u.id, u.username,u.real_name,u.student_id,u.user_type,u.email,u.status, u.phone from users u
user_type = 'admin'
and status = #{status}
AND ( username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{usernameOrRealNameOrStudentId}, '%') OR real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{usernameOrRealNameOrStudentId}, '%') OR student_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{usernameOrRealNameOrStudentId}, '%') )

select u.id, u.avatar_url, u.password, u.phone, u.username, u.real_name, u.student_id, u.user_type, u.email, u.status, u.token_version, u.grade, u.major, u.violation_count, u.ban_until, u.last_login_time, u.last_login_ip, u.created_at, u.updated_at from users u where username = #{username}
